snippet.title: Marvel Studios' Black Panther - Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Long live the king. Watch the new trailer for Marvel Studios #BlackPanther. In theaters February 16! ► Subscribe to Marvel: http://bit.ly/WeO3YJ
